div.h3: Coordination happens entirely on the GPU Command Processor

ul.li: Latency Path: CUDA Event signaling avoids PCIe round-trips to the Host CPU, reducing sync latency by ~2-5ms.
Command Queue: cudaStreamWaitEvent inserts a hardware command into the GPU stream (Wait-On-Event), not a software wait in the driver.
Asynchrony: The CPU thread is released immediately after cudaMemcpyAsync, allowing for massive CPU-GPU overlap.
Hardware State: Stream 2 is physically idle on the Copy Engine until Stream 1 clears the pipeline and sets the HW event register.

text.tspan: (Non-blocking on Host | Stalls GPU Stream 2 Engine)
CPU Thread proceeds to Task B
BARRIER: HW must clear all ALUs
